meaning: adj.流浪的,漂泊的,浪荡的,流浪者的n.流浪者,游民,浪子,流氓,懒汉vi.到处流浪
examples: These were strange words to the vagabond boy's ears, and the pleasantest he had ever heard.
The film "Vagabond" is a huge improvement.
You may remember Chris because I have written about his colorful past as a hippie vagabond.
But then, Rollhaus has been something of a vagabond entrepreneur all his life.
